one_liner: Subscription dog-walking for busy Bangalore pet parents with GPS-tracked walks and vetted walkers.
problem_statement: Urban professionals in Bangalore struggle to find reliable, background-checked dog walkers on short notice. Existing marketplaces are fragmented, lack real-time walk tracking, and offer no subscription pricing for recurring schedules.
solution_summary: PawTrail is a mobile-first subscription platform connecting pet owners with verified walkers in Koramangala, Indiranagar, and HSR Layout. Owners book recurring slots, receive live GPS routes, and pay a flat monthly fee with rollover credits.
target_market: Dual-income households in Bangalore's top 3 tech corridors, owning medium/large dogs, spending ₹3,000–₹8,000/month on pet care.

tam_sam_som.methodology: Bottom-up: 180k dog-owning households in Bangalore × ₹2,200 ARPU × 12; SAM filtered to premium corridors; SOM assumes 3-year capture of 6,200 subscribers.

differentiation: Subscription-first pricing with guaranteed walker assignment
Live GPS route + photo proof on every walk
Walker background checks via third-party KYC partner
Hyperlocal ops: 45-minute SLA for same-day reschedule
business_model: B2C subscription (₹1,999 / ₹3,499 / ₹5,999 tiers) + 15% commission on à-la-carte add-ons (grooming referrals, vet visits).

pricing_strategy.rationale: Price 10–15% above informal walkers while undercutting per-walk marketplace rates for recurring users.

risks.risk: Walker supply churn in monsoon season
risks.mitigation: Retention bonuses + indoor play alternative credits

risks.risk: Regulatory ambiguity for gig pet workers
risks.mitigation: Contractor model with insurance rider; legal review before scale
Founding member guarantee + visible walker profiles

assumptions: Bangalore premium pet spend grew 18% YoY (Euromonitor proxy)
Walker supply of 50 can be recruited in 6 weeks with ₹2k signing bonus
Razorpay subscriptions support required billing cadence
